name: opus
description: Totally open, royalty-free, highly versatile audio codec

avx2.description: Builds the library with avx2 instruction set

dred.description: Enable Deep REDundancy (DRED) neural FEC + deep PLC (Opus 1.5). Adds ~2 MB of pre-trained model weights, which the build downloads over the network. Required by DSCA-NG SOTA-5 (DRED decoder-side recovery).
